The potential maximum incubation period for all 20
patients was 11–39 days, and the potential minimum incu-
bation period was 7–32 days. The median incubation peri-
od for all 20 patients was 18 days (range 7–39 days)
(Figure). Among the 11 patients (nos. 10–20) with expo-
sure <48 hours, the potential incubation period was 14–32
days (median 18 days). The incubation periods of patients
with mild cases (range 12–34 days) did not differ from
those of patients with moderate and severe cases (7–39
days).
Conclusions

for Andes virus infection. It provides the most complete
